title: Pipeline Tracker Spreadsheet
description: A simple pipeline tracker for owners who do not have a CRM yet. Track deals, stages, values, and next actions.

sections.title: Pipeline Stage
sections.description: Where the deal is in your process
fields: Stage (Lead / Qualified / Proposal / Negotiation / Won / Lost)

sections.title: Activity Tracking
sections.description: What has happened and what is next

howToUse: Add a new row for every qualified lead. Update the stage and next action after every interaction. Review the Pipeline Summary section during your weekly pipeline review.
